name: codex-review
description: Plugin-backed CodeRabbit-style review system for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Deep code review and safe learning for current changes
interface.longDescription: ReviewPilot bundles the bug-hunting review skill, benchmark workflows, safe GitHub learning intake, and automation helpers into one Codex plugin.
defaultPrompt: Review my current changes for release-blocking bugs
Prepare a deep pre-PR review for this repo
Score this review against the corpus and benchmark lanes
